meta.title: Contact support
meta.description: Reach the PromptMarket team — bug reports, partnerships, and general questions welcome.

header.title: Contact support
header.subtitle: Send an inquiry without leaving the site. Leave an email if you want a reply.

form.categoryHint: Pick the closest type — faster triage means a faster answer.
form.titlePlaceholder: Sum up your inquiry in one line
form.bodyPlaceholder: What's on your mind? For bugs, reproduction steps plus expected vs. actual behavior help a lot.
form.emailHint: Leave it and we'll follow up by email.
form.submitError: Sending failed. Try again in a moment or use the external support board.

receipt.title: Inquiry received
receipt.subtitle: The team reviews submissions in order.
